evals.prompt:
/prd --ingest --project audit-log --file evals/files/audit-log-pm-doc.md

The file evals/files/audit-log-pm-doc.md is located at /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira/.claude/skills/prd/evals/files/audit-log-pm-doc.md. Work in /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira as the project root.
evals.expected_output: A well-structured prd.md at docs/projects/audit-log/prd.md with all 14 user stories from the PM doc assigned stable US-XX IDs and P0/P1/P2 tags, sections 5-6 as empty placeholders, no EA/GA split, and status: draft.
expectations: All user stories in the output prd.md have a stable US-XX ID (e.g. US-01, US-02) prefixed before the priority tag
Every user story has exactly one priority tag: [P0], [P1], or [P2]
The PM doc had 14 user stories — the output prd.md contains exactly 14 user stories (no stories added or dropped)
The 'Affected Surfaces' and 'Dependencies & Constraints' sections each contain only an HTML comment placeholder and no actual content
The output file has status: draft in its YAML frontmatter
The output does not split stories into EA or GA milestone sections
No requirements, metrics, or open questions were invented that were not present in the source PM doc

evals.prompt:
/prd --ingest --project alert-suppression --file evals/files/alert-suppression-pm-notes.md

The file evals/files/alert-suppression-pm-notes.md is located at /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira/.claude/skills/prd/evals/files/alert-suppression-pm-notes.md. Work in /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira as the project root.
evals.expected_output: A prd.md at docs/projects/alert-suppression/prd.md. User stories extracted from prose notes with US-XX IDs. Stories that cannot be confidently priority-tagged are flagged for PM review rather than silently guessed. Non-goals section is flagged as incomplete (the PM doc has a partial non-goals section with an explicit 'need to think through more' note). No invented requirements.
expectations: All extracted user stories have a stable US-XX ID prefixed before the priority tag
Any story that cannot be confidently tagged based on PM's language is explicitly flagged for PM review rather than silently assigned a tag
The Non-Goals section in the output flags or notes that the PM indicated this was incomplete ('need to think through more') — it does not silently invent non-goals
The 'Affected Surfaces' and 'Dependencies & Constraints' sections each contain only an HTML comment placeholder and no actual content
The output file has status: draft in its YAML frontmatter
No requirements, metrics, or open questions were invented that were not present or strongly implied in the source notes
The output does not split stories into EA or GA sections

evals.expected_output: A prd.md at docs/projects/ai-recommendations/prd.md with all 7 user stories tagged, an AI Considerations placeholder added under Open Questions (because the PM doc describes ML model, training data, and privacy considerations), sections 5-6 empty, status: draft.
expectations: All 7 user stories from the PM doc have stable US-XX IDs and P0/P1/P2 tags
An AI Considerations placeholder is added under the Open Questions section (triggered by ML model, training data, and privacy content in the source doc)
The 'Affected Surfaces' and 'Dependencies & Constraints' sections each contain only an HTML comment placeholder and no actual content
The output file has status: draft in its YAML frontmatter
The output does not split stories into EA or GA sections
No requirements, metrics, or open questions were invented beyond what the PM doc contains
